extensionDescription.message: Share large email attachments via Seafile download links

otpHint.message: Only required if two-factor authentication is enabled.

ssoEnterUrl.message: Please enter the server URL first.

ssoUnavailable.message: SSO via local browser is not enabled on this server. The admin needs to set CLIENT_SSO_VIA_LOCAL_BROWSER = True in seahub_settings.py.

ssoTimeout.message: SSO login timed out. Please try again.

ssoError.message: SSO login failed. Please try again.

saveFolderHint.message: Default folder when saving received attachments

existingLinkFound.message: A share link already exists for this file.

showPasswordInEmailHint.message: Default for new links. Can be changed per link.

skipLinkOptions.message: Always use these defaults when inserting Seafile links (skip options dialog)

notConfigured.message: No Seafile account configured. Please set up a Seafile account in Settings → Composition → Attachments.

saveSuccess.message: All selected files saved to Seafile!

saveReplaceExisting.message: Replace existing files with the same name

errorNotConnected.message: Seafile account not connected. Please set up your connection in Settings → Composition → Attachments.

errorNotConfigured.message: Seafile account not fully configured. Please select a library in Settings → Composition → Attachments.

httpWarning.message: Warning: Connecting over HTTP. Your credentials may be transmitted in plaintext.
